creator: hsu@clinet.fi
text:
X server suddenly dies with Sig11.   I never saw this before with
previous kernels, now it has happened three or four times within four
days (the kernel sources were supped at about that time).

How-To-Repeat: 
Run X, start a lot of windows, start doing something very important
and do not save your editor buffers for a long time ;-)
Once it happened when I tried to start netscape, other times
I do not think I had anythign special going on, other than normal
editing.
